name: Alisha Gupta
bio:
Alisha is a medical doctor and Clinical Research Associate, following completion of the Specialised Foundation Programme (2023-2025) in the North East.

She works within Academic Public Health, as part of the North East and North Cumbria Deep End Research Team and the Health Inequalities Team at the Population Health Sciences Institute. She also works with the NIHR Partnership for Workforce Sustainability.
